title: SPARQL - Correct result in JDBC driver, but not in ISQL / SPARQL HTTP endpoint
poc: SPARQL define output:format "JSON" define sql:signal-void-variables 1  SELECT DISTINCT ?floorCount WHERE {   SERVICE <https://ruian.linked.opendata.cz/sparql> {      <https://ruian.linked.opendata.cz/zdroj/stavební-objekty/22088181> <https://ruian.linked.opendata.cz/slovník/početPodlaží> ?floorCount   } };
key_bug_features: Query returns different results in JDBC and ISQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE building_objects (id INT PRIMARY KEY, floor_count INT NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO building_objects (id, floor_count, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'Building with one floor');
INSERT INTO building_objects (id, floor_count, description) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Building with unknown floors');
SELECT id, COALESCE(floor_count, 0) AS floor_count FROM building_objects WHERE floor_count IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT floor_count FROM building_objects WHERE floor_count > 0 ORDER BY floor_count DESC;
